heading: Omitted
label: 573 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which appropriated from the judgment fund sums for the purchase of lands, the establishment of a loan fund, and the establishment and administration of productive enterprises, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act July 27, 1939, ch. 387, § 353 Stat. 1129
